case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. DE AN RIVERO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 75872968) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
